description: An expressionist painting showing a figure partially submerged in turquoise-blue water. Only the head, two hands, and two feet break the surface. The head has a mask-like, anguished face with exaggerated features — deep-set eyes, a wide downturned mouth, and what appears to be a cap or flattened hair rendered in brown tones. The hands emerge palm-up from the water on either side, while the feet protrude in the foreground.
